claimText: Microsoft Copilot Chat is UQ's enterprise AI tool, available to UQ staff and students, and the UQ Library says it provides a higher level of data security and privacy than other AI tools.

citation.citationTitle: Microsoft Copilot Chat - UQ enterprise AI tool
